title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. repandum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. repandum, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like plants family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. repandum may help in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and even supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to address digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
